title: SnowCrafting
description: Ice and powder snow buckets can both now be crafted using snow blocks!
body: # Snow Crafting Ice and powder snow buckets can both now be crafted using snow blocks! Powered snow buckets are crafted with a bucket and a snow block on top of it. The recipe automatically unlocks when a bucket is picked up. Ice can be crafted using a 2x2 of snow blocks, remving the need for silk touch. The recipe is automatically unlocked when a snow block is picked up. I'm open to feedback! If you have requests for what should be added or changed, suggest it on the issues page on GitHub!
